description: CRDs and Custom Resources — Extending the Kubernetes API
summary: CRDs and Custom Resources — Extending the Kubernetes API
target_audience: Learners who have completed Kubernetes Intermediate 2 (already familiar with RBAC, scheduling, NetworkPolicy, Helm, and monitoring)

lectures.title: CRDs and Custom Resources — Extending the Kubernetes API
objectives: Understand the structure of a CustomResourceDefinition (CRD) and OpenAPI v3 schema validation, and define your own CRD
Create custom resources and manage them with kubectl get/describe/explain just like built-in resources
Explain what it means to extend the Kubernetes API and how CRDs operate on the same foundation as built-in resources
